case_title: LAM CHAN VS. ANDREW CHAN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-13-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
